provenance.note: DX inspected the local Three, React Three Fiber, and Drei mirrors for WebGL engine shape, Canvas/root rendering, frame hooks, Stage, Environment, PresentationControls, Text, and MIT license boundaries before curating this source-owned Web Preview scene slice; this is curated launch metadata, not SLSA or live upstream provenance.

advisory_review.note: Curated DX Forge advisory fixture records no known advisory findings for this 3D launch scene slice, but it is not a live advisory feed and does not audit application WebGL shaders, GPU performance, external 3D assets, or optional Three/R3F/Drei dependencies.

license_review.note: License is recorded from the curated package declaration only; no formal DX legal review is claimed.
